title: Temporal Bucketing
description: Datetime truncation, extraction, and bucketing unit definitions.

datetime_truncation_unit.description: Truncation units — truncate a datetime to a boundary. Also used for intervals and datetime arithmetic.

datetime_extraction_unit.description: Extraction units — extract a numeric component from a datetime.

datetime_bucketing_unit.description: All datetime units — truncation + extraction + default. Used for field temporal-unit option.
